category_sources: source_facts.description says portable tracked music player; official homepage describes MikMod as a module player and library supporting MOD, S3M, IT, XM, and other formats.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is MikMod homepage; source_facts.name is mikmod.
docs_sources: Official homepage has a Documentation section and links online documentation for libmikmod3; homepage is also the main user documentation surface for the player.
repo_sources: Official homepage Version Control section says libmikmod and mikmod sources are in the new SourceForge Git repository; SourceForge code page README says it is the source code of libmikmod and mikmod.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says tracked music player; official homepage lists supported tracker module formats and describes MikMod as a module player.
